main.pic-text: A market event as rare as a planetary alignment
main.text:
On March 15th traders will be taken over by a wave of economic reports coming from the U.S., starting from Core CPI data, going into Retail Sales and Crude Oil inventories, and culminating in the Fed Interest Rate Decision.

Take advantage of the unique market conditions with our special profitability on USD-pairs!
main.use-title: How to use it in your trading:
main.use-text: The current forecast level is at 190K. A higher than expected reading will benefit the greenback.
main.risk: *The amount to be credited to the balance in case of successful investment.
